name: scheduling-synthetic-monitor
description: Scheduling_Synthetic_Monitor — CI-6 §5.1 synthetic monitoring Lambda (Phase 1). Continuously exercises the live staging scheduling surfaces: cancel cycle (book→cancel→§14.2 status flip), operator-triggered token-revocation observer (one-time-use success→410, §13.7), and nightly synthetic test-data cleanup (>7d, §5.1 hygiene). HARD prod-guard refuses init when STAGING_TEST_MODE is set in production. Phase 2 (attendance/reminder/disposition cycles) is deferred to WS-E-REMIND + WS-E-ATTEND landing + the FROZEN_CONTRACTS §E1/§E6 lock.

scripts.package: npm run build && zip -j deployment.zip dist/index.js
